# Can I File Bankruptcy Again? - Waiting Periods [2026]
> Can you file bankruptcy again? Waiting periods between filings depend on chapter type. 4, 6, or 8 years. Free 2026 calculator.

## About
canifileagain.org is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- When Can I File Bankruptcy Again? - Interactive Calculator: https://canifileagain.org/calculator.html
- Dismissed vs Discharged Bankruptcy - What It Means for Refiling: https://canifileagain.org/dismissed-vs-discharged.html
- Can I File Bankruptcy Again? - Waiting Periods: https://canifileagain.org/
- Filing Bankruptcy Again - State Rules and Considerations: https://canifileagain.org/state-rules.html
- Automatic Stay Limits for Repeat Filers: https://canifileagain.org/stay-limits.html
- Strategic Refiling of Bankruptcy - When It Makes Sense: https://canifileagain.org/strategic-refiling.html
- Bankruptcy Waiting Periods Chart - All Discharge Bars: https://canifileagain.org/waiting-periods.html
- Privacy Policy: https://canifileagain.org/privacy.html

## Contact
- Website: https://openbankruptcyproject.org
- Email: contact@openbankruptcyproject.org
- GitHub: https://github.com/openbankruptcyproject

## License
Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
